_doc: Storage classification rules. The scanner is a path-pattern matcher; each rule maps a path regex to a category and a retention strategy. Files in unrecognized paths fall through to the 'uncategorized' bucket, which surfaces on the Grafana dashboard so upstream tools that write to non-canonical paths can be fixed.

rules._doc: Published files are the show's contract output. Never reclaim.
Renders are reclaimable when a higher version of the same (shot, pass) exists. Requires upstream tooling to write canonical render paths.
Playblasts older than the latest version per (shot, department) are reclaimable.
Sim and geo caches older than 14 days are reclaimable. Caches usually have no version structure, so we fall back to mtime.
User work-in-progress directories. 30-day retention gives artists time to come back to abandoned experiments without filling the share forever.

uncategorized._doc: Anything that doesn't match a rule lands here. The Grafana panel for 'uncategorized' is the editing surface for this rule file.
